prestazioni: Engine: VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6) – Replace stock turbos with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5-inch downpipes (Injen or aFe Power) and a Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system with dual 4-inch outlets. Target 550whp on E85 with a Cobb Accessport Pro-Tune (Stage 3+ map) and upgraded fuel system (DW450x fuel injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, and Radium Engineering port injection kit).

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (QX60-specific valving) with 25mm front and 20mm rear lowering springs, paired with Eibach 28mm front and 25mm rear sway bars. Reinforce subframes with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars and a Whiteline rear subframe brace to reduce flex under hard cornering.

Drivetrain: Upgraded ZF 9HP transmission with a Level 10 Motorsports valve body and torque converter (3,500 RPM stall), paired with a PRL Motorsports short-throw shifter. Install a Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear differential and upgrade half-shafts to The Driveshaft Shop Stage 3 carbon fiber units. Use a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (if manual swap is performed).
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (QX60-specific, 3-piece overfenders with carbon fiber weave) paired with a custom 3D-printed front splitter (Aeroflow Dynamics) and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler (Seibon). Replace side mirrors with carbon fiber units from Varis Japan and add a custom rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny-inspired, 3-piece design with integrated LED lighting).

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 +25 (front) and 20x11 +30 (rear) in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/40/20 front, 295/35/20 rear). Use D2 Racing forged aluminum wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for flush fitment.

Interior: Full carbon fiber trim kit (Seibon) for dash, door cards, and center console, paired with a custom Alcantara headliner (EuroCompulsion). Replace stock seats with Recaro Pole Position seats (heated/ventilated, QX60-specific mounts) and add a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, bolt-in 6-point design with harness bar). Use a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub and a digital dash (AEM CD-7).
